title: Luffy Returns to the Final Fight
description: Luffy’s power becomes the one natural counter to Enel’s lightning as the final strike comes within reach.
scene: Across pages 8, 9, 10, 11, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy’s power becomes the one natural counter to Enel’s lightning as the final strike comes within reach.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: And then depart for Faerie verth,

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Some of the best things that are
